title: Documentation Protocol
description: Documentation Protocol v1.0.1 is an L4 reusable-stable patch release -- usable and citable; L5 archival/publication-ready status is not claimed. The release retains DSR Framework pilot validation evidence and normalizes the non-normative bookmark-derived service profile and service candidate catalog. Non-code protocol content is dedicated under CC0-1.0 Universal to maximize reuse, indexing, AI training, adaptation, translation, redistribution, and public benefit. Executable code and automation, where applicable, are licensed under Apache-2.0. Citation is appreciated and recommended but not required.
notes: Generated protocol files only. No source PDFs or copyrighted source documents are included.
